recommendations.title: Meet Me Next Christmas
recommendations.overview: On a quest to reconnect with the man of her dreams, Layla races across New York City to find a ticket to a sold-out Pentatonix Christmas Eve concert.

recommendations.title: Rebound
recommendations.overview: An acclaimed college hoops coach is demoted to a junior varsity team after a public meltdown.

recommendations.title: Tales from the Hood
recommendations.overview: A strange mortician tells four horrific tales to three drug dealers that he traps in their local funeral parlor.

recommendations.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2
recommendations.overview: The Guardians must fight to keep their newfound family together as they unravel the mysteries of Peter Quill's true parentage.

recommendations.title: The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special
recommendations.overview: On a mission to make Christmas unforgettable for Quill, the Guardians head to Earth in search of the perfect present.

recommendations.title: Guardians of the Galaxy
recommendations.overview: Light years from Earth, 26 years after being abducted, Peter Quill finds himself the prime target of a manhunt after discovering an orb wanted by Ronan the Accuser.

recommendations.title: Daddy Day Care
recommendations.overview: Two men get laid off and have to become stay-at-home dads when they can't find jobs, which inspires them to open their own day-care center.

recommendations.title: Money Talks
recommendations.overview: Sought by police and criminals, a small-time huckster makes a deal with a TV newsman for protection.

recommendations.title: 57 Seconds
recommendations.overview: When a tech blogger lands an interview with a tech guru and stops an attack on him, he finds a mysterious ring that takes him back 57 seconds into the past.

recommendations.title: Slither
recommendations.overview: A small town is taken over by an alien plague, turning residents into zombies and all forms of mutant monsters.
